reviews.review_description:
I use this app to escape reality,  to relax and take time out.
It would be perfect except for one minor issue, the stars only show under you, so when standing, you al kst have to take a step back to scoop, or when lying down  you can't see or interact at all.

I absolutely love it. I can understand when people say it isn't entertaining, it's so much more than that ! I feel so relaxed and brings me closer to self realisation. 
An amazing experience, if you are looking for an ego less and thought less ( positively meaning) higher experience. The music is wonderful too. My only wish,  not to have the " hands" appearing on the screen.
This application is completely devoid of purpose. It offers no educational value, no entertainment, and lacks visual appeal, providing only some piano music and something intended to look like stars.
i had a great trip here 🍄

This is an awesome experience. 
I love the music also
Its peaceful here

After initial install there was a huge “star person” (or me) in front of me. 2nd time running app, no star person. Zero menus bring them back. Uninstall/reinstall, nothing. How do you get the “star person” back?
This has been one of my life's best experiences so far!

I discovered this app around 2 years ago now, and I still love to come back to it. It’s one of those experiences thats only possible in VR. I love to show it to people. This game does have multiplayer but I’ve never been online to see another person but I’d like to imagine if I did, we’d both simply acknowledge each other. There’s no main menu or any menu for that matter. Just hop in and  ￼indulge. The IK on your body is a bit wonk and the skybox is a bit low res but the rest of the experience makes up for it. I’m using the word experience s lot but there’s no other way to describe it! I can’t express how much I love this app. It’s just perfect. To my knowledge, the developer hasn’t made anything else and there’s been no updates for this and app that fine! There’s not even any bugs from the years which is actually pretty impressive!
I like this app if you couldn’t tell, and I’m going to leave my review off here and say: if you have any time in the world, find a quiet space and take the time to experience this. You won’t regret it.

reviews.review_title: Nice but limited. Potential for growth.
reviews.review_description:
What you see is what you get here. Pretty cool little app that allows you to move little bits of light (stars) around by moving your hands.

There's a bunch of ways in which the devs could branch off and add to or modify this app. I wish I were imaginative and creative enough to come up with some helpful suggestions.

nice to show to people who doesn't know Vr experience.
A little bit limited to experiment, but ok, it's cool :)

This is a hard one to describe. Basically, you float in space surrounded by stars and have a subtle affect on their movement with your hands. I would not call this a game, I would call it a meditative experience. The music is soothing and the experience very relaxing. I use a few apps on Quest 2 for meditation and have now added this for times when I want no guidance but would like to focus on my own thoughts without distraction. It’s free and does not take up much space, so indulge your curiosity and give it a look.
I loved to be among the stars and play with them! there are so many things you can do, so many points of view!  the avatar is also comfortable and fun! can't wait to play with other users
It's exactly as advertised, an experience where you play in a sea of stars with another person. I wish I could make it my homescreen environment
This has the be the most calming and relaxing game I have ever played in my life. 5 stars, I would buy this.
Simple yet meaningful. As experiences go for VR, this has to be one of the most tranquil and mesmerising. Love it.
